parameters.name: threat_model_name
parameters.description: List of requested threat models to retrieve

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (default 1)

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: The max number of alerts to retrieve (up to 50)

parameters.description: Start time of the range of alerts

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: End time of the range of alerts

parameters.name: alert_status
parameters.description: List of required alerts status

parameters.name: alert_severity
parameters.description: List of alerts severity

parameters.name: device_name
parameters.description: List of device names

parameters.name: user_name
parameters.description: List of user names

parameters.name: last_days
parameters.description: Number of days you want the search to go back to

parameters.name: descending_order
parameters.description: Indicates whether alerts should be ordered in newest to oldest order

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Alert's new status

parameters.name: alert_id
parameters.description: Array of alert IDs to be updated

parameters.name: close_reason
parameters.description: Alert's close reason

parameters.name: alert_id
parameters.description: Array of alert IDs to be closed
